PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY, INC.'S MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER CONSENT JUDGMENT BETWEEN CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC. AND GINSEY INDUSTRIES, INC. IS CONTINUED TO JULY 6, 2012 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. THE MOVING PARTY SHALL PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPT. 302 BY 4PM ON JULY 2 WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SUBMITTED ADDITIONAL PAPERS TO THE COURT. AFTER REVIEWING PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION IN CAMERA, THE COURT RULED AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFFS CONSUMER ADVOCACY, INC.'S MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER CONSENT JUDGMENT BETWEEN CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC. AND GINSEY INDUSTRIES, INC. IS GRANTED. ORDER AND JUDGMENT SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (THE COURT DIRECTED THE CLERK TO SHRED PLAINTIFF'S SUPPLEMENTAL DECLARATION.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-31-2012 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumar Advocacy Group, Inc. And Ginsey Industries, Inc.; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-20-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jason Gianvecchio, Esq. of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel. 213.382.3183, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party via court call.

No other appearance. Plaintiff submitted additional papers to the court. After reviewing plaintiff's supplemental declaration in camera, the court ruled as follows: PLAINTIFFS CONSUMER ADVOCACY, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. And Ginsey Industries, Inc. is granted. Order and Judgment signed in open Court. (The court directed the clerk to shred plaintiff's supplemental declaration.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumar Advocacy Group, Inc. And Ginsey Industries, Inc.; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jul-06-2012 Continued To Jul-20-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY, INC.'S MOTION TO APPROVE AND ENTER CONSENT JUDGMENT BETWEEN CONSUMER ADVOCACY GROUP, INC. AND GINSEY INDUSTRIES, INC.
Appearances: Jason Gianvecchio of Yeroushalmi & Associates (213.382.3183) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party; Jeffrey M. Goldman of Pepper Hamilton LLP (949.567.3547) appearing via Court Call for defendant and responding party.
Discussed and the court continued the matter to July 20, 2012. Supporting documents can be provided to the court in camera by July 17, 2012. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR #5976

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumar Advocacy Group, Inc. And Ginsey Industries, Inc.; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Continued To Jul-06-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jason Gianvecchio, Esq., of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel. 213.382.3183, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party;
Jeffrey M. Goldman, Esq., of Pepper Hamilton, Tel. 949.567.3547, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

The matter was discussed. The court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment Between Consumer Advocacy Group, Inc. And Ginsey Industries, Inc. is continued to July 6, 2012 at 9:30 AM in Dept. 302. The moving party shall provide courtesy copies of the moving papers to Dept. 302 by 4pm on July 2 with a cover letter stating the new hearing date. Judge: Harold Kahn; Not reported.

Notice Of Motion And Motoin To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment; Memo Of Points And Authorities In Support; Declaration Of Reuben Yeroushalmi
Off Calendar Jun-29-2012 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jason Gianvecchio, Esq., of Yeroushalmi & Associates, Tel. 213.382.3183, appearing for Plaintiff and moving party;
Jeffrey M. Goldman, Esq., of Pepper Hamilton, Tel. 949.567.3547, appearing for Defendant and opposing party.

The court vacated its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CONSUMER ADVOCACY, INC.'S Motion To Approve And Enter Consent Judgment is off calendar. This motion is a duplicate entry per the moving party. Judge: Harold Kahn; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
